feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cannot create WT with Sample Split /SCWM/QINSP253
entry.content:
Hi,

we are working in an ERP BS7 connected to a decentral EWM on S/4 HANA.

We are currently upgrading the EWM to S/4 HANA 2023 FPS01.

Since the upgrade, the QM Sample Process does not work anymore, as we are unable to create putaway warehouse tasks with the following message: /SCWM/QINSP253 "Can't create warehouse tasks until external sample is calculated".

The process did work in the old release without any issues ( on S4HANA 2021 02 (05/2022) FPS)

The strange part: 

In my POV, the Inspection document is updated with the correct External Sample size quantity. The status is fine as well. 

I am unsure, why we are unable to create an inbound warehouse task.

Am I missing something here? 

Config:

EWM

Thank yo

BR

Timo

entry.title: Recheck Documented Credit Decision automatically?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a program we can run in the background that would "recheck" documented credit decision cases?

Let's say a sales order document is on credit block because the customer's credit limit is exceeded. After the customer made a payment, the blocked document should get rechecked because the credit exposure has been reduced enough to allow the sales order to get created, thus allowing the sales order to be released.

Would program RVKRED09 serve this function?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Prepayment Is not Getting Activated in PO ( No Tab is displayed)
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We have activated Prepayment at company code level, but no where it is showing in the PO that this is related to Prepayment and also PPX Transaction Event is not getting triggered.

Can you please help us to achieve this cycle?

 

Thanks

entry.title: List of field changes in Transactions when migrating from ECC to S4
entry.content: When migrating from ECC to S4, the screens for most transactions have remained the same but there are some where the fields have been moved around the screen for a different layout.  I like to know if anyone has a compiled list of field changes to some of these transactions.

entry.title: S4HANA GUI missing insert delete button on Notif DMS
entry.content:
S4HANA GUI notification not showing the insert and delete button. However it is showing on the Fiori app.

S4HANA VS ECC GUI notification- Document tab

Fiori App

Please provide any inputs to correct this issue. Thanks!

entry.title: Run /SDF/RC_START_CHECK failed with ABAP dump.
entry.content:
Hi Expert

I have an error while running /SDF/RC_START_CHECK, a dump is happened.

Could you help me resolve it?

 

Runtime Errors SYNTAX_ERROR
Date and Time 2024/11/06 17:50:39
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|Short text |
| Syntax error in program "CLS4SIC_HR_TIME_MANAGEMENT====CP ". |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|What happened? |
| Error in the ABAP Application Program |
| |
| The current ABAP program "CL_ABAP_TYPEDESCR=============CP" had to be |
| terminated because it has |
| come across a statement that unfortunately cannot be executed. |
| |
| The following syntax error occurred in program |
| "CLS4SIC_HR_TIME_MANAGEMENT====CP " in include |
| "CLS4SIC_HR_TIME_MANAGEMENT====CM002 " in |
| line 26: |
| "Comma without preceding colon (after SELECT ?)." |
| " " |
| " " |
| " " |
| |
| The include has been created and last changed by: |
| Created by: "SE_SRC20 " |
| Last changed by: "SAP " |
| Error in the ABAP Application Program |
| |
| The current ABAP program "CL_ABAP_TYPEDESCR=============CP" had to be |
| terminated because it has |
| come across a statement that unfortunately cannot be executed. |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|What can you do? |
| Please eliminate the error by performing a syntax check |
| (or an extended program check) on the program "CLS4SIC_HR_TIME_MANAGEMENT====CP |
| ". |
| You can also perform the syntax check from the ABAP Editor. |
| |
| If the problem persists, proceed as follows: |
| Note down which actions and inputs caused the error. |
| |
| |
| To process the problem further, contact you SAP system |
| administrator. |
| |
| Using Transaction ST22 for ABAP Dump Analysis, you can look |
| at and manage termination messages, and you can also |
| keep them for a long time. |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|Error analysis |
| The following syntax error was found in the program |
| CLS4SIC_HR_TIME_MANAGEMENT====CP : |
| "Comma without preceding colon (after SELECT ?)." |
| " " |
| " " |
| " " |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|How to correct the error |
| Probably the only way to eliminate the error is to correct the program. |
| - |
| If you cannot solve the problem yourself and want to send an error |
| notification to SAP, include the following information: |
| |
| 1. The description of the current problem (short dump) |
| |
| To save the description, choose "System->List->Save->Local File |
| (Unconverted)". |
| |
| 2. Corresponding system log |
| |
| Display the system log by calling transaction SM21. |
| Restrict the time interval to 10 minutes before and five minutes |
| after the short dump. Then choose "System->List->Save->Local File |
| (Unconverted)". |
| |
| 3. If the problem occurs in a problem of your own or a modified SAP |
| program: The source code of the program |
| In the editor, choose "Utilities->More |
| Utilities->Upload/Download->Download". |
| |
| 4. Details about the conditions under which the error occurred or which |
| actions and input led to the error. |
| |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|Source Code Extract |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|Line |SourceCde |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| 1|method describe_by_name . |
| 2| |
| 3| data: |
| 4| crc type XTYPE_TYPE. |
| 5| |
| 6|* check name for sequence of c |
| 7| system-call check p_name for sequence of c |
| 8| class 'CL_ABAP_TYPEDESCR' method 'DESCRIBE_BY_NAME' parameter 'P_NAME'. |
| 9| |
| 10|* get administration information |
|>>>>>| system-call describe administration |
| 12| mode 'N' of p_name into admin_tab_line-xtype crc admin_tab_line-kind. |
| 13| |
| 14|* look at hash tabel wether descr object already exists |
| 15| read table admin_tab from admin_tab_line into admin_tab_line. |
| 16| if sy-subrc = 0. |
| 17| p_descr_ref ?= admin_tab_line-ref->get( ). |
| 18| if p_descr_ref is bound. |
| 19| return. |
| 20| endif. |
| 21| delete table admin_tab from admin_tab_line. |
| 22| endif. |
| 23| |
| 24|* create new descr object |
| 25| case admin_tab_line-kind. |
| 26| when kind_elem. |
| 27| raise event create_elemdescr |
| 28| exporting xtype = admin_tab_line-xtype. |
| 29| when kind_ref. |
| 30| raise event create_refdescr |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Vendor Payment Term with Fix Amount
entry.content:
Hello,

Do you know if it is possible to create an installment payment term with fix amount?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: GRV RECIPIENT NAME PRINT
entry.content:
We are encountering a challenge with our current ordering process in SAP S4 HANA. Specifically, when orders are placed for foremen, the Goods Receipt Voucher (GRV) only displays the name of the person who created the Purchase Requisition (PR), not the intended recipient. This causes delays as we have to manually check SAP to identify who the materials were ordered for, which is time-consuming. This is especially challenging as MCOs often order in bulk for multiple foremen in their areas of responsibility.

Is there a way to adjust the SAP process so that the GRV automatically reflects the recipient's name (e.g., Oupa)? Alternatively, could a report be generated that shows the intended recipient for the goods to streamline the collection process?

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA PPDS con IBP SUPPLY, REQUERIMIENTOS HEURISTIC SAP_PP_002
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working whit  SAP PPDS that is embedded with SAP S/4 HANA version 2023.

We run the heuristic SAP_PP_002 to generate the planned orders.

This heuristic considers the following requirements:

1) Sales forecast

2) Sales orders

3) Safety stock

4) Stock transport requests

The SAP S/4 HANA PPDS is coexisting with the IBP Supply, and this generates the KEY FIGURE TARGET.

In some runs we are going to take the above 4 requirements, but in other runs we will only take the KEY FIGURE TARGET.

I have the following questions:

1) How can I get the heuristic SAP_PP_002 to not consider the 4 requirements above and only consider the KEY FIGURE TARGET?

2) Or what other heuristic can I use to take only the KET FIGURE TARGET as a requirement?

3) Is there any BADI, BAPI or ENHANCEMENT that can help me?

Best regards,

Arnulfo Cordero Pradel

entry.title: Intercompany matching and reconciliation (ICMR) - period closing and opening
entry.content:
Is there a way to close periods in ICMR like we do it in S4HANA accounting? Users wanted to close a period, so that the matchings made in the months (period) cannot not be unassigned or new matching cannot be made for the documents of that period. Similar to accounting where you cannot post anything in the closed period.

 

I know about reconciliation close, but that blocks matching altogether, and when current period is open it allows to edit (match and unassign) all documents, also of previous periods. Any workaround may be appreciated if there is no standard feature for this.

SAP S/4HANA #ICMR SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting

entry.title: Fiori App F1366A Manage Bank Accounts --> Activate Button Missing
entry.content:
Dear All.

the Activate button is missing in one of our systems. This means that if we have a bank account with the status inactive, it cannot be used. At the same time, the overview of bank accounts across all statuses does not show the bank account saved as inactive.
We have checked permissions, roles and job catalogues and used the logs from the app help. Unfortunately, no results so far.
Can anyone give us a hint why the ‘Activate’ button is missing?

entry.title: Can APO be used across both S/4H and a legacy ECC system ?
entry.content:
As clients move to S/4H, some are using a phase approach. However, there is conflicting suggestions that APO cannot be used across both S/4H and ECC. Please can you confirm if this is possible?

many thanks
Irene

entry.title: Create RAP Business Events for change pointers / IDocs
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are in an S/4HANA conversion project to S4H 2023 FPS1 On-Prem. On a separate note we are asked to provide a future looking concept for a more event base / pushed based integration landscape.

That being said I stumbled upon RAP Business Events, and my takeaway was that this ought to be the way forward for event based integration that originates from an ABAP Platform (here S4H 2023) system.

Now one of the current interfaces (of course) distributes parts of the material master to an external system. Currently this is pull, so the external system periodically asks for changes. We want to switch this to push, and levaraging an EDA, e.g. SAP Event Mesh in Integration Suite.

My questions

  1.  Is my assumption, that RAP Business Events is generally the future direction and would be a match for the requirement correct?
  2. If using RAP BE, how would we raise those events for a changed material? Can we use change pointers or existing BOR event linkages?
  3. Optional: What benefits will the also existing Event Enablement Add-On for S/4HANA play in such regard. Is it even necessary when we are on S4H 2023 FPS1 (I also read that with FPS2 some additional features arrive in the area of RAP

Many thanks and kind regards

Jens

entry.title: Urgent - handling units are missing in vekp/vepo tables but available in document flow of a delivery
entry.content:
We are receiving an inbound idoc to post goods issue using the message type - SHP_OBDLV_CONFIRM_DECENTRAL.

FM used is BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CONFIRM_DEC.

Idoc is getting processed successfully but handling units are not getting created in the tables VEKP and VEPO.

But we can see the handling units in the document flow of a delivery.

We tried to debug it multiple times, couldnt find any error .

entry.title: Batch Determination with FEFO in STO
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts, 

I have a requierement to activate FEFO in STO (PO with UB type), The FEFO strategy is already created and activated for transfers via MIGO, but in STO  I don't know if it's possible or not 

Could you please help 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Kanji Characters not visible when using Microsoft Edge Browser with FIORI App ME23N
entry.content:
Hello,

 

SAP recommends the MS Edge Browser when working with S/4HANA FIORI Apps.
When we use the Print Preview of a Purchase Order, containing Kanji Characters, with the FIORI App ME23N in MS Edge, the the Kanji Characters are there, but not visible.
Doing the same with Firefox Browser the Characters are visible.

entry.title: Maintenance Plan has plan dt too far in the future. last complete 6/2024 next dt 09/2026
entry.content:
the Maintenace plan is a strategy plan on a 4Mo, YYR cycle.

The last order was completed 6/13/2024 the next plan date is 10/1/2026  to be called 9/13/2026

I have attached images of the scheduling list

entry.title: Automatic assignment of decimals zeros for specific fields in QM - Inspection plan Migration Object
entry.content:
When migrating quality inspection plans from SAP EECC to SAP S/4HANA, the decimal values in the numeric fields of the quantitative inspection characteristics are not preserved. During the migration of the inspection plan, the value 10 is automatically assigned in the decimal field (STELLEN) for each characteristic, and 7 zeros are added to the right of the numeric values (SOLLWERT, TOLERANZUN, TOLERANZOB).

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Replacement of function module - SD_CREDIT_EXPOSURE in S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

The customer was using the function module SD_CREDIT_EXPOSURE in the ECC system. However, its obsolete in S/4HANA. If you may please suggest the replacement of this function module in S/4HANA. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Link sales orders to contracts in bulk for Data Migration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have query regarding data migration. Actually, during Sales order migration, we are not able to link the sales order contract number in the sales order. There is no field for the contract in the template of the sale order. We have uploaded the Sales order via migration cockpit. In order to, link the Contract number in the Sales Order we have planned to use LSMW but unfortunately it is not working properly. 

It will be very hard to do this activity manually from VA02 since the volume is high. 

So, can we add the sales contract of a sales order in bulk?

Thank you.
